data.name: Niramare Quest: Saving a World That Loves Hating Me
data.detailed_description:
Tooru is a simple man trying to live his life at its fullest when a heart attack puts an end to it all... or does it? He actually meets a stern but generous goddess who not only reincarnates him in another world, but even gives him a cheat power! There's only one problem: The matriarchal society of the new world hates him just for being a man! To make things worse, there's a Demon Lord threatening the peace, and Tooru is stuck at level 1 like all other men due to an unbreakable curse...

Saving a world under these conditions seems an uphill battle. It's going to take a lot of elbow grease to befriend the members of his party and overcome all the challenges ahead, but if anyone can do it, it's the stubborn and single-minded Tooru!

Accompany him, Lucy, Morgana, and Eili on a journey to save the queendom and uncover a story full of twists and turns!

Niramare Quest offers a classic JRPG party-based experience with a heavy focus on story and questing. Grow stronger as the characters level up, equip and improve gear, and unleash increasingly powerful abilities.

The inn run by the Adventurers' Guild will be your hub. From here you can embark on missions, both urgent and low-priority, as well as interact with your party members and deepen your bond.

Many more locations await you in the capital city of the queendom, from a blacksmith to bars and accessory shops to a combat arena, many of which have optional quests to find and complete.

An Engaging Story

This world is full of secrets, and things aren't always what they seem. Why do women hate all men? Who really is the Great Mage? Just who is the Demon Lord, and what does he want? Uncover the lost past of the Queendom of Derletia as you fight to save it... and find out if it's really worth saving it.

Classic RPG Combat

Niramare Quest is not all about chatting. Fighting is an integral part of the game, and many enemies and bosses stand between you and the end. Upgrade your characters and gear, and even take on optional challenges that will offer great rewards.

data.short_description: Reincarnate as a man in a misandrist world in this classic turn-based RPG! Meet colorful characters, fight your way through many dungeons, and unravel the mysteries of a story that hides much more than meets the eye. Do you have what it takes to save a world where everybody hates you?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 11/10/8
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and Seguzecute, All Rights Reserved.

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
